C.20.16:
Proxy: % ratio of recycled plastic, computed as [% ratio of recycled packaging plastic] * [EU total % of packaging plastic over plastic]; where: 
% recycled packaging plastic is taken from "Packaging waste by waste management operations", see EUSTAT filecode [ENV_WASPAC__custom_3768868]; and
EU total % of packaging plastic over plastic = 0.399 (“Plastic Recycling Factsheet” file: euric_-_plastic_recycling_fact_sheet.pdf).
NOTE: the above computation valid under assumption that total plastic waste equal total plastic produced. 
Alternative proxy: % of plastic manufactured in trhe country that is recycled. This proxy is not available.
C.29.1:
Proxy: % new electric vehicles out of total new vehicles (& of sales). 
Source: Eustat ROAD_EQR_CARBUA, IEA_EV
Where data for % car sales is not available, % of car usage is used as proxy
C.30.2:
Proxy: share [Electrified  length of lines in km] / [Total  length of lines in km] in %. This variable is the same used for the study TAC EU2020.
Datasource: https://ec.europa.eu/eurostat/databrowser/view/RAIL_IF_LINE_NA__custom_1160037/default/table?lang=en
Desired proxy: % of electric locomotives out of total. Some data exist at EU level with limited coverage. However, global data could not be found. Hence we opted for a proxy that could be used for comparison. 
Caveats: some countries could be importing electric locomotives so that manufacturing TAC would be much worse than the proxy computed here.
D.35.11: Proxy: [Total gross electricity production from renewable sources] / [Gross electricity production in Gwh] in %. Datasource:https://ec.europa.eu/eurostat/databrowser/view/NRG_BAL_PEH__custom_1160933/default/table?lang=en
D.35.21:
Proxy used: % ratio of biogas manufacturing out of total gas manufacturing (bio + natural), see note file
Sources: production biogas from IEA Bioenergy Task 37, A perspective on the state of the biogas industry from selected member countries, https://www.ieabioenergy.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/03/IEA_T37_CountryReportSummary_2021.pdf 
https://www.europeanbiogas.eu/mapping-the-state-of-play-of-biomethane-in-europe/#:~:text=The%20study%20shows%20that%20the,and%20France%20(1%2C207%20GWh).
production of natural gas: "https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_countries_by_natural_gas_consumption
 "Natural gas – consumption". www.cia.gov.
 "BP's Statistical Review of World Energy June, 2018" (PDF)"
D.35.3:
Proxy: % of Renewable energy sources in heating and cooling out of total. 
Datasource: Eurostat https://ec.europa.eu/eurostat/databrowser/view/nrg_ind_ren/default/table?lang=en
Variable: "Renewable energy sources in heating and cooling" in %, last available year.
